children.heading: Certification of designated medical gases
children.label: a Certification of designated medical gases
A
children.text: A description of the medical gas.

children.label: B
children.text: The name and address of the sponsor.

children.label: C
children.text: The name and address of the facility or facilities where the medical gas is or will be manufactured.

children.label: D
children.text: Any other information deemed appropriate by the Secretary to determine whether the medical gas is a designated medical gas.

children.label: A
children.text: the medical gas subject to the certification is not a designated medical gas;

children.label: B
children.text: the request does not contain the information required under paragraph (1) or otherwise lacks sufficient information to permit the Secretary to determine that the medical gas is a designated medical gas; or

children.label: C
children.text: denying the request is necessary to protect the public health.

children.label: I
children.text: In the case of oxygen, the treatment or prevention of hypoxemia or hypoxia.

children.label: II
children.text: In the case of nitrogen, use in hypoxic challenge testing.

children.label: III
children.text: In the case of nitrous oxide, analgesia.

children.label: IV
children.text: In the case of carbon dioxide, use in extracorporeal membrane oxygenation therapy or respiratory stimulation.

children.label: V
children.text: In the case of helium, the treatment of upper airway obstruction or increased airway resistance.

children.label: VI
children.text: In the case of medical air, to reduce the risk of hyperoxia.

children.label: VII
children.text: In the case of carbon monoxide, use in lung diffusion testing.

children.label: VIII
children.text: Any other indication for use for a designated medical gas or combination of designated medical gases deemed appropriate by the Secretary, unless any period of exclusivity for a new drug under clause (iii) or (iv) of , clause (iii) or (iv) of , or , or the extension of any such period under , applicable to such indication for use for such gas or combination of gases has not expired.section 355(c)(3)(E) of this titlesection 355(j)(5)(F) of this titlesection 360cc of this titlesection 355a of this title

children.label: I
children.text: the information required by ;section 353(b)(4) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: a warning statement concerning the use of the medical gas as determined by the Secretary by regulation; and

children.label: III
children.text: appropriate directions and warnings concerning storage and handling.

children.heading: No exclusivity for a certified medical gas
children.label: i No exclusivity for a certified medical gas
children.text: No designated medical gas deemed under subparagraph (A)(i) to have in effect an approved application is eligible for any period of exclusivity for a new drug under section 355(c), 355(j), or 360cc of this title, or the extension of any such period under , on the basis of such deemed approval.section 355a of this title

children.heading: Effect on certification
children.label: ii Effect on certification
children.text: No period of exclusivity under section 355(c), 355(j), or , or the extension of any such period under , with respect to an application for a drug product, shall prohibit, limit, or otherwise affect the submission, grant, or effect of a certification under this section, except as provided in subsection (a)(3)(A)(i)(VIII) and .section 360cc of this titlesection 355a of this titlesection 360ddd(1)(H) of this title

children.heading: Withdrawal, suspension, or revocation of approval
children.label: 4 Withdrawal, suspension, or revocation of approval

children.heading: Withdrawal, suspension of approval
children.label: A Withdrawal, suspension of approval
children.text: Nothing in this part limits the Secretary’s authority to withdraw or suspend approval of a drug product, including a designated medical gas deemed under this section to have in effect an approved application under or .section 355 of this titlesection 360b of this title

children.heading: Revocation of certification
children.label: B Revocation of certification
children.text: The Secretary may revoke the grant of a certification under paragraph (2) if the Secretary determines that the request for certification contains any material omission or falsification.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A designated medical gas shall be subject to the requirements of unless the Secretary exercises the authority provided in to remove such medical gas from the requirements of , the gas is approved for use without a prescription pursuant to an application under section 355 or 360b of this title, or the use in question is authorized pursuant to another provision of this chapter relating to use of medical products in emergencies.section 353(b)(1) of this titlesection 353(b)(3) of this titlesection 353(b)(1) of this title

children.heading: No prescription required for certain uses
children.label: A No prescription required for certain uses
i
children.text: For use in the event of depressurization or other environmental oxygen deficiency.

children.label: ii
children.text: For oxygen deficiency or for use in emergency resuscitation, when administered by properly trained personnel.

children.heading: Labeling
children.label: B Labeling
children.text: For oxygen provided pursuant to subparagraph (A), the requirements of shall be deemed to have been met if its labeling bears a warning that the oxygen can be used for emergency use only and for all other medical applications a prescription is required.section 353(b)(4) of this title
